# FreightFlow

FreightFlow is a logistics platform that optimises last-mile fleet routing
for regional shipment carriers. We plan multi-stop truck routes across
warehouse networks in under 30 seconds.

## How it works

A dispatch operator uploads a manifest. We solve the vehicle routing problem
across the fleet, return an ordered shipment sequence, and stream live
route updates to drivers.

## Why

Most freight carriers in tier-2 India still plan routes in Excel. A wrong
sequence costs fuel, driver hours, and missed windows. FreightFlow is a
drop-in router with a clean API.
